description:
Offered: every semester
Spanish for Beginners II enhances students’ Spanish communication skills by expanding vocabulary, grammar, and cultural awareness. It includes listening, speaking, reading, and writing exercises in the classroom and in the online language lab.
Note: If you are someone who has had over two years of high school Spanish or regularly listens to Spanish at home, please contact the Humanities Department to request an evaluation for SPAN 2000 .
Meets General Education Requirement(s): WS
